title: polyalthia sessiliflora
intro: Polyalthia sessiliflora, also known as the Khasi Pine or Khasi Cedar, is a tropical tree species native to the Himalayas and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polyalthia sessiliflora include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
